mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TB_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_POST ( POST_ID, MEMBER_NO, BOARD_TYPE, TITLE, BODY, LOST_SPECIES, LOST_FEATURE, REGION, STATUS_CD, REG_DATE, TAGS, VIEW_COUNT, LIKE_CNT ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{memberNo}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{body}, #{lostSpecies}, #{lostFeature}, #{region}, #{statusCd}, SYSDATE, #{tags}, 0, 0 )
mapper.sql: POST_ID AS postId, MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, TITLE AS title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(BODY, 32000, 1) AS body, LOST_SPECIES AS lostSpecies, LOST_FEATURE AS lostFeature, REGION AS region, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, REG_DATE AS regDate, TAGS AS tags, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, LIKE_CNT AS likeCnt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TB_POST WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND NVL(STATUS_CD, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('TOWN', 'LIFE', 'SHARE')
mapper.sql:
WHERE p.STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE'
AND p.BOARD_TYPE IN ('TOWN', 'LIFE', 'SHARE')
AND p.BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType}
AND ( UPPER(p.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.BODY, 32000, 1)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(m.NICKNAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND p.LOST_SPECIES = #{petSpecies}
AND p.TAGS LIKE '%ANSWERED%'
AND (p.TAGS IS NULL OR p.TAGS NOT LIKE '%ANSWERED%')
mapper.select:
SELECT p.POST_ID AS postId, p.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, p.TITLE AS title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.BODY, 200, 1) AS body, p.REG_DATE AS regDate, p.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, p.LIKE_CNT AS likeCnt, p.TAGS AS tags, p.LOST_SPECIES AS lostSpecies, m.NICKNAME AS authorName FROM TB_POST p LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON p.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO
ORDER BY p.REG_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_POST p LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON p.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TB_FILE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_FILE ( FILE_ID, REF_TYPE, REF_ID, DRIVE_FILE_ID, FILE_URL, ORIGIN_NAME, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{driveFileId}, #{fileUrl}, #{originName}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_URL FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'POST' AND REF_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY FILE_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_POST SET VIEW_COUNT = NVL(VIEW_COUNT, 0) + 1 WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('TOWN', 'LIFE', 'SHARE')
UPDATE TB_POST SET LIKE_CNT = NVL(LIKE_CNT, 0) + 1 WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('TOWN', 'LIFE', 'SHARE')
UPDATE TB_POST SET LIKE_CNT = GREATEST(NVL(LIKE_CNT, 0) - 1, 0) WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('TOWN', 'LIFE', 'SHARE')
